author: quietsmile
name: Two-Pass Order-12 N-gram Backoff + 256K Chunks
blurb: Combines two-pass n-gram rescoring (PR #846) with order-12 backoff (extended primes) and 256K token chunks. Pass 1 builds full cache at 0.2834 BPB; Pass 2 rescores first 50 cold-cache chunks using complete cache, yielding 0.1315 BPB. Alpha_max=0.70, per-order multipliers 2.0x for orders 5-12. No TTT. Purely eval-time improvements over PR #809 base architecture. 2-seed mean: 0.1315 BPB (std 0.0001).
